auth.popupBlocked: Popup blocked. Please allow popups for this site.
auth.loginFailed: Failed to start login. Please try again.

username.title: Username
username.signInPrompt: Sign in to customize your username

sync.title: Sync
sync.label: Enable Sync
sync.descriptionOff: Your plans are stored locally only

choiceDialog.title: Choose Your Sync Preference
choiceDialog.description: Your planners are stored locally on this device by default. You can optionally enable cloud sync to access them across devices. Only manually saved plans will sync.
choiceDialog.privacy: Cloud sync stores your data on our servers. You can change this setting anytime.
choiceDialog.exportHint: You can also export your planners from the Settings page to backup or transfer them.

comments.label: Comments
comments.description: Notify when someone comments on your plan

recommendations.label: Recommendations
recommendations.description: Notify when your plan reaches recommended status

newPublications.label: New Publications
newPublications.description: Notify when someone publishes a new plan

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.signInPrompt: Sign in to manage your account
deleteAccount.warning: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone after the grace period.
deleteAccount.confirmMessage: This action will permanently delete your account, all saved plans, and all comments after the grace period.
deleteAccount.cannotUndo: This action cannot be undone after the grace period expires.
deleteAccount.success: Account scheduled for deletion on {{date}}. Log in within {{days}} days to cancel.
deleteAccount.error: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

footer.disclaimer: Dante's Planner is an unofficial fan-made website. All game assets, artwork, and trademarks belong to Project Moon.

toast.alreadyUpvoted: You have already upvoted this comment
toast.alreadyReported: You have already reported this comment

home.tagline: Build your perfect Mirror Dungeon deck

communityPlans.title: Faust's Plans
communityPlans.empty: Be the first to share a plan

md.title: Mirror of Names and Spiders Now Open
md.subtitle: Theme Packs, Deploy, Skill Swap, E.G.O Gifts... Record and track without forgetting

extraction.subtitle: Calculate the Lunacy for upcoming Focused Extractions and plan ahead

info.title: In-Game Info
info.description: Placeholder page for game information (Identities, EGOs, EGO Gifts).

planner.title: Planner
planner.description: Placeholder page for Mirror Dungeon run planner.

community.title: Faust's Plans
community.description: Placeholder page for Faust's plans (share plans, discuss strategies).

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: Dante's Planner ("we", "us", or "our") respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our website.

dataCollected.title: Information We Collect
dataCollected.content: We collect the following data to provide our services:
items: Email address when you sign in with Google
Anonymized IP address for security and guest user identification
Anonymized device identifier to identify guest users across sessions
Your synced and published plans (local-only plans are not uploaded)
Anonymous usage analytics to improve the service

dataUse.title: How We Use Your Information
items: Identify guest users for local plan storage
Sync your plans across devices (for signed-in users)

dataSharing.title: Information Sharing
dataSharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with third-party services (Google OAuth, analytics) only as necessary to operate the service.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and preferences. No tracking cookies are used without your consent.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You can delete your account and all associated data at any time through the Settings page.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For privacy-related questions, contact us at

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using Dante's Planner, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

description.title: Service Description
description.content: Dante's Planner is a fan-made tool for planning and sharing game strategies for Limbus Company. We are not affiliated with Project Moon.

userConduct.title: User Conduct
items: Upload harmful, offensive, or illegal content
Attempt to disrupt or abuse the service
Impersonate others or misrepresent your identity
Use automated tools to scrape or overload the service

content.title: User Content
content.content: You retain ownership of plans you create. By publishing plans publicly, you grant us a license to display them to other users. Published plans may be forked (copied and modified) by other users. We may remove content that violates these terms.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The service is provided "as is" without warranties. We are not responsible for data loss or service interruptions. All game assets belong to Project Moon.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may update these terms. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For questions about these terms, contact us at

exportImport.title: Export / Import
exportImport.description: Backup your plans to a file or restore from a previous backup. No server interaction.

errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

generic.title: Something Went Wrong
generic.message: We encountered an unexpected error. Please try again.

communityPlans.connectionLost: ... My connection to Faust has been severed.
communityPlans.title: Connection Lost

moderation.accountSuspended: Your account has been suspended. Reason: {{reason}}
